commit_scope: Add a bounded host carrier that emits a live code-tool-learning coding-act receipt from a committed code turn and verifier evidence.

commands.command: python3 scripts/code_tool_learning_receipt.py --commit HEAD --verify "code-tool-learning-band::cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/tool-channel.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/code-tool-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/code-tool-learning-band.fk" --verify "code-tool-learning-gate::cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh code-tool-learning"
commands.output: PASS code-tool-learning-receipt status=pass commit=8d17b86ce6ca files=7 verifiers=2 trust=62->74 cache=.cache/code-tool-learning/20260615T161004Z/coding-act-receipt.json

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A committed coding turn can now emit a derived code-tool-learning receipt with hashed source surfaces, hashed patch recipe, verifier hashes, choice receipt, and accepted learned trust delta.
test_flows: The script inspects merged PR #3199 commit 8d17b86ce6cab02086175f1f151a921142613b54 against its first parent.
The receipt reports 7 source surfaces and 7 touched files.
The script runs two explicit verifier commands and stores status, duration, and output hashes without raw output retention.
The receipt reports trust 62->74, sample_count=1, accepted=1, and raw_patch_retained=0.
